description:
cloudstack_network_acl

Creates a Network ACL for the given VPC.

argument_reference.name: name
argument_reference.description: The name of the ACL. Changing this forces a new resource to be created.

argument_reference.name: description
argument_reference.description: The description of the ACL. Changing this forces a new resource to be created.

argument_reference.name: project
argument_reference.description: The name or ID of the project to deploy this instance to. Changing this forces a new resource to be created.

argument_reference.name: vpc_id
argument_reference.description: The ID of the VPC to create this ACL for. Changing this forces a new resource to be created.

attributes_reference.name: id
attributes_reference.description: The ID of the Network ACL

import:
Network ACLs can be imported; use <NETWORK ACL ID> as the import ID. For example:

terraform import cloudstack_network_acl.default e8b5982a-1b50-4ea9-9920-6ea2290c7359When importing into a project you need to prefix the import ID with the project name:

terraform import cloudstack_network_acl.default my-project/e8b5982a-1b50-4ea9-9920-6ea2290c7359
